page.title: Partner API Keys
page.subtitle: Issue API keys so partner apps and screens (a table tablet) can browse the menu, take orders, self-pay and watch order status live.

create.title: Create API key
create.originsHint: Where the partner is redirected back to after self-pay. One per line or comma-separated.

list.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to connect a partner screen or app.
list.confirmRevoke: Revoke the key "{{name}}"? Any screen using it stops working immediately.

secret.copiedIntro: The secret has been copied to your clipboard.
secret.saveNow: Save it now — we cannot show it again.

toast.created: API key created. Save the secret now — it won't be shown again.
toast.createFailed: Could not create the API key
toast.revokeFailed: Could not revoke the API key
